diagrams.title: Basic Tree Structure
diagrams.description: A labeled tree showing root, parent, children, siblings, leaf nodes and internal nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understand fundamental tree terminology and relationships

diagrams.title: Binary Tree Types
diagrams.description: Comparison of Full, Complete, Perfect and Skewed binary trees

diagrams.title: Tree Traversals
diagrams.description: Example tree with all four traversal methods showing node visit order
diagrams.purpose: Understand different ways to visit all nodes in a tree
